# IDM Services NW

> IDM Services NW is a specialist telecoms and network infrastructure engineering company headquartered in the Liverpool region, North West England, delivering nationwide across the UK. Family-run, with deep experience in fibre optic splicing, testing, structured cabling, and mission-critical network delivery.

## What we do

- Telecoms services: fibre optic splicing, installation and OTDR testing; cable installation and termination; structured and copper cabling; fault finding, repair and maintenance; 24/7 rapid response. Experienced in Openreach FTTP and PIA build programmes.
- Data centre services: rack and structured cabling deployment, fibre infrastructure, testing, certification and commissioning, network reconfiguration and upgrades, fault diagnosis, 24/7 just-in-time response.
- MDU (multi-dwelling unit) delivery: internal fibre installation for apartment blocks and multi-tenant buildings, including survey, install, splice, test and certification.
- Commercial and industrial: offices, retail, warehouses, manufacturing, multi-site estates — new installations, moves and changes, emergency repair.
- Rail infrastructure: network cabling installation, testing, certification, reconfiguration and upgrades aligned with rail sector safety requirements.

## Key facts

- Headquarters: Liverpool region, North West England
- Coverage: Nationwide (UK)
- Availability: 24/7 rapid response and on-call engineering
- Quality: Working towards ISO 9001 accreditation; digitally managed delivery (electronic workforce management, eDatachase Atom Ultima)
- Contact: info@idmservicesltd.com
